events.name: Into the Hollow — north mouth
events.description: The rune-stones flare; the gate is a doorway.

kind.flavor: You step through the North Gate into a cavern of pale rock.

events.name: Into the Hollow — east mouth
events.description: The rune-stones hum as you cross the threshold.

kind.flavor: You step through the East Gate. The Hollow opens before you.
You step through the South Gate. The air thickens, dust and old breath.

events.name: Into the Hollow — west mouth
events.description: The weathered arch parts at your touch.

kind.flavor: You step through the West Gate. The Hollow stretches east and south.

events.name: Survivors' Camp
events.description: A handful of survivors huddle around a fire, clutching torn maps.

kind.speaker: Elder Marwen
lines: You walk these roads now? Brave. Or fool. The same, these days.
The Frost Lord was the lid on a kettle. You smashed it, and now the kettle boils.
Four castles. Four lords. Lords that should still be sleeping.
If you mean to set this right — and the only ones who can still walk are the ones who must — start with the cold one.
Castle of Frost, north along the road. But its gates are sealed.
Find Hael at the old spire, west of here. He owes me a favour and he likes a long walk.

outcomes.text: Find Hael at the Spire of Hael, west of here.

events.name: Spire of Hael
events.description: Smoke curls from the cracked window. A wiry old man peers down.

kind.speaker: Hael the Hedge-Wizard
lines: Marwen sent you. Of course she did. She's been sending everyone since the sky changed.
Listen — the Frost Castle's seal is keyed to Starstone fragments. I have one. It's yours.
But fashioning a key takes effort, and effort takes pacing. Walk the long road and come back. The further you wander, the truer the key cuts.
Bring me distance and I'll bring you a way in.
Walk two kilometers along the chaos roads. The corrupted will test you. Don't die.
Come back to me when you've earned the steps.

outcomes.text: Walk 2 km in the chaos lands, then return to Hael.

events.name: Hael's Promise Kept
events.description: Hael holds out a pale-blue key, breath misting in the cold spire air.

kind.speaker: Hael the Hedge-Wizard
lines: You walked. You bled, by the look of those boots. Good.
Here. The Frostbound Key. It will open the outer gate of the cold one's castle.
Inside you'll find the Queen of Frost. She was the first of the four to wake.
She remembers her old name and resents the new world. Go gently if you can. Strike if you cannot.
Either way — walk back here when she's done. There are three more castles after this one.

outcomes.text: Received: Frostbound Key. The Castle of Frost is to the north.

events.name: Castle of Frost — Sealed
events.description: The gate hums with old magic. It won't open without a key.

kind.speaker: Voice from the Gate
lines: Cold seeps from every joint of the stone.
The gate is sealed. A key shaped like a splinter of starlight would fit here.
You should find Hael at the old spire. He'll know what to do.

outcomes.text: The gate is sealed. Seek Hael at the Spire of Hael.

events.name: East Gate Scout
events.description: A weathered scout warming her hands at the rune-stones.

kind.speaker: Scout Lirien
lines: You walked all the way out here? Then you've seen what's wrong with the world.
I've been watching the Castle of Flame from this gate. The forge inside is melted shut — fused itself like a wound trying to scar.
Found this in the ash-line near the keep. Copper, but it stays warm. The Lord of Flame fears it, I think.
Take it. Crack that door. Bring me back the Lord's quiet, if you can.

outcomes.text: Received: Ember Talisman. The Castle of Flame is to the north.

events.name: Castle of Flame — Sealed
events.description: The basalt gate has welded itself shut. Heat shimmers off the stone.

kind.speaker: Voice from the Forge
lines: The door is one continuous molten weld. No pry-bar will open it.
Scouts at the East Gate have been watching this place. One of them might have something that could crack it.

outcomes.text: The gate is forge-sealed. Visit the East Gate scout.

events.name: Lord of Flame
events.description: The talisman flares against the door — it splits with a crack like a struck anvil. Heat washes out.

dialogue_intro: Mortal. You felt the rim of the talisman and thought yourself ready.
I have been Lord of every forge that ever cooled. Each pause between hammer-strokes — that was me, gathering.
And now you give me an excuse to wake the iron in your blood.
dialogue_defeat: The forge banks itself. The iron cools.
Walk well, mortal. Two remain — and one of them does not burn.

outcomes.text: Lord of Flame defeated! Dropped: Fire Blade. Two castles quiet. Two remain.

events.name: South Gate Hermit
events.description: A wiry figure sits cross-legged by the rune-stones, a black-glass lantern unlit at her side.

kind.speaker: Hermit Sora
lines: I came south to be alone with the quiet. Now the quiet has teeth.
Beyond this gate, the Castle of Shadow draws a shroud across itself. You will walk up to it and find you are walking away.
Take my lantern. It burns inward — the void-light. Carry it and the shroud will lift.
Bring back the silence of that place. Whatever silence the Hierophant has left.

outcomes.text: Received: Voidlight Lantern. The Castle of Shadow is to the south-west.

events.name: Castle of Shadow — Veiled
events.description: Each step you take toward the castle, the path bends you away from it. The shroud is hungry.

kind.speaker: Voice from the Shroud
lines: The way is veiled. You cannot find the door from outside the door.
The South Gate hermit speaks of an anti-light. Without it the shroud will turn you home, again and again.

outcomes.text: The shroud turns you away. Visit the South Gate hermit.

events.name: Hierophant of Shadow
events.description: The lantern flares — the shroud parts. A hooded figure rises from a half-collapsed throne of obsidian.

dialogue_intro: You carry a candle into a cathedral and call it bravery.
I am Hierophant of every word never said aloud. I am the quiet you fled to make this noise.
Step forward. I will teach you the silence you were too afraid of.
dialogue_defeat: Curious. The candle was bigger than the cathedral.
Walk on, mortal. The storm-bound is the last.

outcomes.text: Hierophant of Shadow defeated! Dropped: Dragonslayer. Three castles quiet. One remains.

events.name: West Gate Wanderer
events.description: A traveler with charred boots and a copper-braided wrist-cord squints up at you.

kind.speaker: Wanderer Cael
lines: I was a fisherman. Then the cliffs east of here started ringing with thunder, and a castle stood where no castle stood.
Storm Castle. Lightning falls on anyone who climbs the cliff path.
I made this — copper and yew, the old way. Wear it and the bolts will pass around you. They won't strike a thing that won't conduct.
If you make it inside, end the Stormbinder for me. He was the storm I never saw coming.

outcomes.text: Received: Grounding Charm. The Castle of Storm is to the east.

events.name: Castle of Storm — Lightning-Ringed
events.description: The cliff path is hammered with bolts. You won't take three steps before one finds you.

kind.speaker: Voice from the Cliffs
lines: Lightning crowns this place. Without a way to ground the strikes, the climb will kill you.
The West Gate wanderer makes charms that let the storm pass around you. Find him first.

outcomes.text: Lightning forbids the path. Visit the West Gate wanderer.

events.name: Stormbinder
events.description: The charm hums against your wrist as you climb. At the keep's heart, a figure turns from the open sky, lightning crowning his head.

dialogue_intro: You came up the cliff with copper at your wrist. Clever, mortal.
I bound the storm to me when the boundary broke. The bolts go where I tell them, except — apparently — where you stand.
Then we will see what falls when the storm cannot reach you.
dialogue_defeat: Four castles quiet. Walk to the centre. The Starstone is waiting for the second cut.

outcomes.text: Stormbinder defeated! Dropped: Stormbringer. Four castles quiet. The Starstone awaits.

events.name: Queen of Frost
events.description: She turns from the throne, crown of icicles gleaming. The temperature plummets.

dialogue_intro: I was made to rule the cold places — and you woke me.
Tell me, walker — who sent you? Marwen? Hael? The Starstone itself?
It does not matter. The boundary is broken. I will be the cold that closes it.
dialogue_defeat: Curious. You walked all the way here just to end me again.

outcomes.text: Queen of Frost defeated! Dropped: Frost Axe. One castle quiet. Three remain.
